case_title: SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. VS. TANITH LEE NICHOLS et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUL-24-2013 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT TANITH NICHOLS' APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 CONTINUED FROM JUL-24-2013 TO MASTER CALENDAR MOTION AT JUL-31-2013, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. ANGELA GRANADA REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT TANITH NICHOLS IS CURRENTLY AT THE HALL OF JUSTICE WITH A PENDING CRIMINAL HEARING. SHE WILL NOTIFY THE APPLICANT OF THE CONTINUANCE DATE. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: E. BURA; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICHOLS, TANITH (OWES COURT FEES) LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1334 VAN NESS AVE., NO. 302, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUL-31-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT TANITH NICHOLS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE - BASED ON INCOME AND FAILURE TO APPEAR. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
